channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: How to Watch ‘Malcolm in the Middle: Life’s Still Unfair’ Online
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Get ready for a blast from the past, folks. It's been nearly 20 years since we said goodbye to the Emmy-Award winning sitcom 'Malcolm in the Middle'. But now, the lovable and quirky family is back with a four-part miniseries, 'Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair'. Starring Frankie Muniz, Bryan Cranston, and Jane Kaczmarek, this series picks up where we left off, with Malcolm returning to his family's manic lives for his parents' 40th anniversary celebration."
[Short music transition]
Host: "The original series had a impressive seven-season run on ABC, with 151 episodes and 33 Emmy Award nominations. And now, you can catch the new miniseries on Hulu and Disney+, starting this Friday, April 10. If you're not a subscriber, don't worry - you can sign up for Disney+ and get access to Hulu's streaming library, starting at just $12.99 per month."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Or, if you're looking for an alternative, you can get access to Disney+ through DirecTV's streaming packages, starting at $35 per month. And, new subscribers can even take advantage of a five-day free trial to stream 'Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair' for free online. So, what are you waiting for? Catch up with the Malcolm in the Middle family and see what's new with them. The miniseries is available to stream now, so go check it out."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next episode. Don't forget to follow us for more updates on your favorite TV shows and streaming services."
